mapper.sql: r.oom_id, r.rqst_sn, r.rqst_dt, r.rqst_user_id, r.rqst_cn, r.resp_dt, r.resp_user_id, r.resp_cn, r.use_bgng_dt, r.use_end_dt, r.frst_reg_dt, r.frst_reg_user_id, r.last_chg_dt, r.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_oom_check_addl_rqst r WHERE r.oom_id = #{oomId} AND NOW() BETWEEN r.use_bgng_dt AND r.use_end_dt ORDER BY r.rqst_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_oom_check_addl_rqst (oom_id, rqst_sn, rqst_dt, rqst_user_id, rqst_cn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{oomId}, #{rqstSn}, NOW(), #{rqstUserId}, #{rqstCn}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
